item.text: I have the relevant paths. `addTrack()` already supports indexed insertion via `splice`, so T5 can target `index = 0` without widening that utility. Next I’m patching the three files that actually carry the missing behavior.
I’m applying the batch 3 edits now. The changes are localized to the indicator interface/adapter, the top-label container classes, and the internal drag callback signature/call site.

The main batch edits are in. I spotted one follow-on issue in the indicator effect: it reads `position?.isNewTrackTop`, so the effect dependencies need to include that field or the top/bottom label can go stale mid-drag. I’m tightening that now and then I’ll verify the changed signatures and classes.
